provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, skinny teenage boy of african descent in his late teens on his first ship assignment, wearing an oversized white galley apron over a charcoal undersuit that is clearly handed down and too long in the arms, rubber kitchen clogs, a towel tucked into his apron string, food prep gloves that are too big for his hands, he stands uncertainly like someone who is still learning where things go
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
